key.name: enabled-providers
key.description: List of provider IDs to fetch quota/balance data for. Supported: zai, openai, deepseek.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh usage data from all enabled providers (30-3600 seconds).

key.name: show-percentage-in-panel
key.description: Whether to show the usage percentage next to the icon in the top panel.

key.name: show-logos
key.description: Whether to show provider logos on the provider tabs in the popup menu.

key.name: display-mode
key.description: Whether the indicator and progress bars reflect "used" or "remaining" quota.

key.name: high-usage-threshold
key.description: Usage percentage above which the indicator turns orange.

key.name: critical-usage-threshold
key.description: Usage percentage above which the indicator turns red.

key.name: zai-api-key
key.description: API key for Z.AI authentication. Get it from https://z.ai/manage-apikey

key.name: zai-oauth-token
key.description: OAuth access token obtained via Z.AI OAuth login flow.

key.name: zai-oauth-refresh
key.description: OAuth refresh token for obtaining new access tokens.

key.name: zai-oauth-expiry
key.description: Unix timestamp when the OAuth access token expires.

key.name: zai-endpoint
key.description: API endpoint: 'intl' for api.z.ai (international) or 'cn' for open.bigmodel.cn (China mainland).

key.name: openai-oauth-token
key.description: OAuth access token for OpenAI API. Can be extracted from browser session or OpenCode auth.json.

key.name: openai-oauth-refresh
key.description: OAuth refresh token for obtaining new access tokens.

key.name: openai-oauth-expiry
key.description: Unix timestamp when the OAuth access token expires.

key.name: deepseek-api-key
key.description: API key for DeepSeek authentication. Get it from https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys

key.name: opencode-go-workspace-id
key.description: Your OpenCode Go workspace ID (found in the dashboard URL: /workspace/{id}/go).

key.name: opencode-go-auth-cookie
key.description: The 'auth' cookie value from your OpenCode browser session. Extract from browser DevTools.
